content:
感謝各位守密人的支持！
《忘卻前夜》OST：奧瑞塔EP·天真的驚悚童話，今日發佈～歡迎大家收聽、下載及分享～如果有基於OST的二次創作，也歡迎分享給我們！ （二創請遵照同人規則，OST內容請勿商用）

忘卻前夜OST：奧瑞塔EP·天真的驚悚童話
這來自靈魂的空虛與裂隙唯有最純真的童話才能填補。
終有一日，她會告別痛苦，回到童話中充滿歡樂的「故鄉」。

作曲：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
規劃：B.I.A.V. Studio

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

Thank you for your support!

《Morimens》OST：《Aurita EP: Innocent Horror Fairytale》 was released today. 
Welcome everyone to listen, download and share. If you have secondary creations based on the OST, please also share them with us!
 (Please follow the rules of the fandom for secondary creations, and do not use the OST content for commercial purposes)

《Morimens》OST：《Aurita EP: Innocent Horror Fairytale》 
Only the purest fairy tales can fill the void and rift from the soul.
One day, she will bid farewell to her pain and return to the joyful "home" of the fairy tale.

Composer：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio

Planning：B.I.A.V. Studio
thread_title: 忘卻前夜OST：奧瑞塔EP·天真的驚悚童話
